#+title: Fixture: OOPS!-derived org-lint checkers (M8 sliver)
#+author: ELOT test suite

# Fixture for the OOPS!-derived org-lint checkers shipped with
# `elot-org-lint':
#
#   - elot/oops-missing-annotations    (P08)
#   - elot/oops-recursive-definition   (P24)
#   - elot/oops-duplicate-labels       (P32)
#
# Expected lint findings (only the three OOPS! checkers above):
#
#   P08 fires on:
#     - ex:undocumented   (no rdfs:label, no comment, no definition)
#
#   P08 does NOT fire on:
#     - ex:labelled       (has rdfs:label)
#     - ex:described      (has rdfs:comment)
#     - ex:defined        (has skos:definition)
#     - ex:annotatedOp    (has dcterms:description)
#
#   P24 fires on:
#     - ex:recursive      (SubClassOf :: ex:recursive and ex:animal)
#     - ex:looper         (EquivalentTo :: ex:looper and ex:thing)
#
#   P24 does NOT fire on:
#     - ex:dogfood        (SubClassOf :: ex:dogfoodThing -- substring of own
#                          local name, but not a word-boundary match)
#
#   P32 fires on:
#     - ex:twin1, ex:twin2 (both labelled "Twin"@en)
#
#   P32 does NOT fire on:
#     - ex:houseEn, ex:houseDe (labels share text "House" but differ in lang)

* my-ont
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont
:ELOT-context-type: ontology
:ELOT-context-localname: my-ont
:ELOT-default-prefix: ex
:header-args:omn: :tangle ./my-ont.omn :noweb yes
:END:

** Prefixes
:PROPERTIES:
:prefixdefs: yes
:END:

#+name: prefix-table
| prefix   | uri                                         |
|----------+---------------------------------------------|
| owl:     | http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#              |
| rdf:     | http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns# |
| rdfs:    | http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#       |
| xsd:     | http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#           |
| skos:    | http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#        |
| dcterms: | http://purl.org/dc/terms/                   |
| ex:      | http://example.org/                         |
| exo:     | http://example.org/ont/                     |

** my-ont ontology (exo:my-ont exo:my-ont/0.0)
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont-ontology-declaration
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:

 - rdfs:comment :: A test ontology for the OOPS! sliver.

** Datatypes
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont-datatypes
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:

** Classes
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont-class-hierarchy
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:

*** Animal (ex:animal)
 - rdfs:label :: Animal

*** Thing (ex:thing)
 - rdfs:label :: Thing

*** Undocumented (ex:undocumented)

*** Labelled (ex:labelled)
 - rdfs:label :: Labelled

*** Described (ex:described)
 - rdfs:comment :: A described class.

*** Defined (ex:defined)
 - skos:definition :: A defined class.

*** Recursive (ex:recursive)
 - rdfs:comment :: Refers to itself in its SubClassOf row.
 - SubClassOf :: ex:recursive, ex:animal

*** Looper (ex:looper)
 - rdfs:comment :: References itself via EquivalentTo.
 - EquivalentTo :: ex:looper, ex:thing

*** Dogfood (ex:dogfood)
 - rdfs:comment :: Should NOT trigger P24; ex:dogfoodThing only contains
   the substring ex:dogfood without a word boundary.
 - SubClassOf :: ex:dogfoodThing

*** DogfoodThing (ex:dogfoodThing)
 - rdfs:label :: Dogfood Thing

*** Twin one (ex:twin1)
 - rdfs:label :: "Twin"@en

*** Twin two (ex:twin2)
 - rdfs:label :: "Twin"@en

*** House (English) (ex:houseEn)
 - rdfs:label :: "House"@en

*** House (German) (ex:houseDe)
 - rdfs:label :: "House"@de

** Object properties
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont-object-property-hierarchy
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:

*** chases (ex:chases)
 - rdfs:label :: chases
 - Domain :: ex:animal
 - Range :: ex:animal

** Data properties
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont-data-property-hierarchy
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:

** Annotation properties
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont-annotation-property-hierarchy
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:

*** annotated op (ex:annotatedOp)
 - dcterms:description :: An annotation property documented via dcterms:description.

** Individuals
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont-individuals
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
